member.name: F:AbilityKit.Protocol.Moba.StateSync.OpCodes.SubscribeStateSync
member.summary: 订阅状态同步 - 客户端请求通过 Gateway 订阅服务器战斗快照。

member.name: F:AbilityKit.Protocol.Moba.StateSync.OpCodes.SnapshotPushed
member.summary: 快照推送 - 服务器向客户端推送世界状态快照

member.name: F:AbilityKit.Protocol.Moba.StateSync.OpCodes.DeltaSnapshotPushed
member.summary: Delta 快照推送 - 增量状态更新

member.name: T:System.Runtime.CompilerServices.IsExternalInit
member.summary: Polyfill for C# 9.0 init accessor in .NET Framework 4.x Required for MemoryPack generated code compatibility
